title: fleischmannia rivulorum
intro: Fleischmannia rivulorum, also known as "False Bone-set", is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Fleischmannia rivulorum include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Fleischmannia rivulorum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
